false_decoy.actually_belongs: Movies with numbers in the title
false_decoy.why: ROCK FRIDAY sounds vaguely plausible as a music event or phrase, but it's not standard. The suspicion is the trap - FRIDAY actually belongs in movies (Friday the 13th).

thinking.all_16_words: BOTTOM STAR SOLID CANDY CANNON NEURON KILN ENGINE CATCH OCEAN APOLLO FRIDAY WINTER GRUMBLE CODING STEAMING
thinking.board_build: Yellow: PREFIX_BLANK 'ROCK ___' - BOTTOM, STAR, SOLID, CANDY. Green: THINGS_THAT_VERB 'Things that FIRE' - CANNON, NEURON, KILN, ENGINE. Blue: IDIOM_COMPLETION '___-22' style (numbers in phrases) - CATCH (Catch-22), OCEAN (Ocean's Eleven), APOLLO (Apollo 13), FRIDAY (Friday the 13th). Purple: HIDDEN_WORD_INSIDE drinks.
thinking.cross_pull_analysis: CATCH tempts toward ROCK CATCH (not a phrase but sounds plausible). STAR could be ROCK STAR (yes!) or could solvers think STAR FIRE? CANNON sounds military like APOLLO (space program connection). FRIDAY sounds like it could go with other time words if they existed on board.
thinking.decoy_seed_1: WINTER - could be 'ROCK ___' (ROCK WINTER doesn't work but WINTER ROCK or thinking of winter as a season) OR hidden drink
thinking.decoy_seed_2: CATCH - could be 'Things that FIRE' (CATCH fire) OR 'ROCK ___' (ROCK CATCH doesn't work) OR idiom 'catch ___'

underused_candidates: All Tier 3 mechanics are available. Most Tier 2 mechanics available except METAPHOR_SUBSTITUTES and WAYS_TO_VERB. From Tier 1: TAXONOMY, PREFIX_BLANK, SYNONYMS available.
mechanic_balance.warmup_strategy: Since we're in warmup (only 1 tagged puzzle), LEAN TOWARD TIER 2 AND TIER 3. Don't double up on Tier 1 unless cross-pulls are exceptional. Will use: 1 Tier 1 (PREFIX_BLANK), 2 Tier 2 (THINGS_THAT_VERB, IDIOM_COMPLETION), 1 Tier 3 (HIDDEN_WORD_INSIDE).

thinking.repeat_check_last_60_days: Checked puzzles back to early March 2026. No word repeats. No category theme repeats (no rock phrases, no things that fire, no movie titles with numbers, no hidden drinks).
thinking.self_critique: Strong decoy potential with STAR (ROCK STAR is real). CATCH is medium decoy. Hidden drinks are clean and surprising. Board has good variety of mechanics during warmup.
thinking.surface_pattern_test: ROCK ___ words don't all start with same letter. Things that FIRE are diverse (weapon, brain cell, oven, vehicle). Movie titles are varied lengths/styles. Hidden drink words have no surface tell.
